ref: Jesus told the man to stand up where everyone could see him.
text: Yesu vɛ oti a kĩ ye kɔkpɔ ku a kĩ ɛnɛ ɛyaadza nɛ bati a flee anɛ kamɛ.
translated: Jesus said to them, if you are the children of Abraham, then do the works of Abraham, but now you want to kill me

ref: When Jesus and his disciples were near the town of Caesarea Philippi, he asked them, “What do people say about the Son of Man?”
text: Kĩ Yesu wo kakɔ a kĩ kifuã Kaisarea Filipi ɔmatɔ a, evia ye fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a kĩ, “Owei bati alɛ kĩ Otidziwa Obi a anɛ?”
translated: And Jesus went to the region of Caesarea Philippi with his disciples, and on the way he asked his disciples, “Who do people say the Son of Man is?”

ref: A man came to Jesus and asked, “Teacher, what good thing must I do to have eternal life?”
text: Luwi a onyole odi ya nɛ Yesu sɛkɛ̃ ɛvia ye kĩ, “Fɔtsa Ɔtsanɛ, lɛtsa wĩ lɔɔdabe kɛnɛ kĩ nkɛna mɔ maana daa nkpã a?”
translated: And Jesus said to them, “Why are you afraid, you of little faith, did you not know that I am with you?”

ref: But I tell you not to swear by anything when you make a promise! Heaven is God's throne, so don't swear by heaven.
text: Lɛmɛ finyaa mabi mi kĩ mitalɔ fubo ntɛ miakɛna nhihiɛ adi. Mitatani ode, kitonɛkĩ Baguma lɛgãkpo yanɛ.
translated: The hunter went to the farm and saw that his crops had been destroyed by the animals again. The hunter said, the elephant has come to Baguma's village again.

ref: So Jesus was baptized. And as soon as he came out of the water, the sky opened, and he saw the Spirit of God coming down on him like a dove.
text: Kĩ Yohanes wɔla Yesu mui eyua a, ɛnɛ nɛ mui a kamɛ lɛtalɛta, ade ode binya ɛkpa Yesu, ɛmɔ Baguma Hũhũ kĩ yaka ndɛ mblɔduma aye ɛyadzi nɛ ye akũ.
translated: And John testified saying, I saw the Spirit descending from heaven like a dove, and it remained upon Jesus, and I did not know him, but he who sent me to baptize with water said to me, Upon whom you see the Spirit descending and remaining on him, it is he who baptizes with the Holy Spirit.
